mapper.select: SELECT id, rule_id AS ruleId, question_type AS questionType, category_id AS categoryId, difficulty, question_count AS questionCount, score_per_question AS scorePerQuestion, sort_no AS sortNo, create_time AS createTime FROM paper_rule_detail WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} ORDER BY sort_no
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO paper_rule_detail (rule_id, question_type, category_id, difficulty, question_count, score_per_question, sort_no) VALUES
(#{item.ruleId}, #{item.questionType}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.difficulty}, #{item.questionCount}, #{item.scorePerQuestion}, #{item.sortNo})
